prompt: A macro photography style image of a large green taro leaf resting on cracked, dry earth. The left half of the leaf is vibrant, healthy green. The right half of the leaf is charred black and disintegrating, with glowing orange embers forming the precise geometric pattern of a dense urban street grid. The dry earth beneath the burned half also faintly shows a city grid pattern etched into the dirt. Roots seamlessly blend into the grid lines. Dramatic lighting, high contrast, photorealistic. No text, no labels, no legends, no numbers, no chart elements.
insight: Since 1990, global urban land area has more than doubled, systematically fracturing natural habitats and consuming green spaces with grid-like expansion.
